description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a flat green roof and minimalist landscaping. The structure features clean, angular lines and a white facade, with large windows and several recessed entryways. The front includes a driveway and a paved approach, while the rear and sides are bordered by a mix of trees and shrubs. A partially covered patio or pergola area is visible, providing an outdoor living space. The building's layout is L-shaped, maximizing garden views and natural light. The overall design emphasizes openness, simplicity, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat green roof, white facade, large windows, and minimalist landscaping. The L-shaped layout features a driveway, patio, and integrated outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and a clear view of the flat green roof and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the L-shaped layout, large windows, and a partially covered patio or pergola area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the extended green roof, side entryways, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_3: Alternate front view with a focus on the driveway, main entrance, and the symmetry of the landscaping and facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and patio doors
